name: Ka Diam Dua (Pineapple Fish Chowder)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Raw shrimp, shelled, deveined and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin of the fish and cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Heat the oil in a saucepan; sauté the garlic and onions for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the water, orange rind, bay leaf, chili peppers, anise, saffron, and sherry. Bring to a boil.
4. Add the fish and cook over medium heat for ten minutes.
5. Add the shrimp and cook over low heat for another 10 minutes.
6. Mix the cornstarch with the soy sauce and a little water to make a smooth paste. Stir into the soup until thickened.
7. Add the pineapple and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Taste for seasoning. Discard the bay leaf.
9. Serve with boiled rice. Serves 8-10.
